project_type: C++ AI assistant system with header-only .cpp module includes compiled into a single binary
build_system: make (clang++ on macOS, single compilation unit via #include in system/mk_entry.cpp)
test_framework: Custom test framework in tests/test_main.cpp with TEST_ASSERT macros. Tests compile as separate binary (mk_os_test) that also uses single-compilation-unit #include pattern.
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'make clean && make' from MK_OS/ directory - should compile with only warnings (no errors). 2. Run 'make test' - all tests should pass (currently 47). 3. New tests for this feature should be added to tests/test_main.cpp or tests/test_integration.cpp.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - dependencies (libcurl, libsqlite3) are pre-installed. Just run 'make' from MK_OS/ directory.
environment_constraints: Open internet available. Build uses clang++ with -std=c++17 -O2 -Wall -Wextra -DDARWIN. All modules are header-style .cpp files included directly (no separate .o linking). The project uses libcurl for HTTP and libsqlite3 for database.
contribution_requirements: No formal CONTRIBUTING.md. Code follows existing patterns: each module is a single .cpp file with #ifndef guards, included from mk_entry.cpp or test_main.cpp. Classes use MK prefix naming convention.
key_patterns: 1. All modules are .cpp files with header guards (#ifndef/#define/#endif). 2. Modules are included via #include in mk_entry.cpp (main) and test_main.cpp (tests). 3. MKSystem struct in mk_entry.cpp holds all module instances. 4. Telegram commands are handled in telegram_poll_loop() which parses JSON manually. 5. cloud_llm.cpp already has provider abstraction (CloudProviderConfig) with failover. 6. llm_engine.cpp handles local LLM (llama.cpp/Ollama). 7. The existing conversation pipeline: isConversation? -> local LLM -> cloud LLM -> Genesis -> template fallback.
directory_structure: MK_OS/ is the main source directory. system/ has mk_entry.cpp (entry point). llm/ has cloud_llm.cpp, llm_engine.cpp, model_manager.cpp. plugins/ has telegram.cpp. ai_core/ has smart_router.cpp, conversation_mode.cpp, genesis/, hre/. mk_brain/ has memory/, personality/. homelab/ has SSH, Docker, device management. config/ has mk_config.cpp. tests/ has test_main.cpp and test_integration.cpp.
